description: STRATEGIC NOTE: Unlike LIC AAO, the NIACL AO exam counts English marks for final merit. It also includes a mandatory 'Computer Knowledge' section in Mains and features 0.25 negative marking. Preparation must focus on General Insurance (Motor, Health, Fire) rather than Life Insurance. This guide is optimized for the 2026 Recruitment Cycle.

subjects.name: English Language (Prelims & Mains)
subjects.analysis: CRITICAL: Marks are added to final merit. Focus on grammar and vocabulary to boost your rank.

subjects.name: Reasoning Ability
subjects.analysis: Puzzles are the weightage leaders. Mains requires higher-order analytical reasoning.

subjects.name: Quantitative Aptitude
subjects.analysis: Data Interpretation is 40% of the paper. Proficiency in Speed Math is mandatory for Prelims.

subjects.name: General Awareness & Insurance (Mains)
subjects.analysis: Focus on General Insurance (Health, Motor, Marine) and current financial trends.

subjects.name: Computer Knowledge (Mains)
subjects.analysis: Unique to NIACL/NICL. Focus on hardware, software, and basic networking logic.

mentorship_data.title: English: The Game Changer
mentorship_data.content: Unlike LIC, English marks are added here. Do not treat it as qualifying; treat it as your scoring weapon.

mentorship_data.title: General Insurance Strategy
mentorship_data.content: Focus on motor and health insurance terms. Know the major public sector insurers and their headquarters.

mentorship_data.title: Negative Marking Alert
mentorship_data.content: A 0.25 penalty exists. High attempts with low accuracy will lead to failure in high-cutoff states.

frequently_asked_questions.q: Are English marks added to the final merit?
frequently_asked_questions.a: Yes, in NIACL AO, marks from all sections of Phase I and Phase II are considered for merit.
Yes, there is a penalty of 0.25 marks for every wrong answer.

frequently_asked_questions.q: What is the difference between LIC and NIACL?
frequently_asked_questions.a: LIC is Life Insurance (Life coverage); NIACL is General Insurance (Health, Motor, Fire, etc.).
Yes, Essay and Letter writing are conducted online immediately after the objective Mains exam.
